use_cases: Audio podcast playback with waveform-style seek bar and time display
Text-to-speech audio preview for voice synthesis applications
Playback speed control for educational audio content
Buffering state indication during audio loading
ai_summary: A customizable audio player component with play/pause controls, seek functionality via Radix UI slider, playback rate settings dropdown, and real-time time/duration display. Features buffering state detection, error handling, and context-based API for multi-item audio management. Built with Lucide icons and Tailwind styling for clean, minimal interface.
